goals.description: Finish this last bit of the trivial chore so I can walk into that meal with my head high and not feel like a slacker who bailed on the crew.

goals.rationale: Being present with high-trust friends is the only thing that matters in the short term. I need to feel connected and validated by them before I think about future consequences or academic growth. Pushing the project deadline back an hour feels like a smart play to protect my social energy right now.
